pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.4 to 3.2.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 21 to utilize new language features and ensure compatibility with the runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated MySQL connector artifact with the new Java-based connector.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; 'mysql-connector-j' is the required replacement for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace SpringDoc OpenAPI UI dependency with the Spring Boot 3 compatible starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old 'springdoc-openapi-ui' artifact is not compatible with Spring Boot 3; the new 'springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui' is required.
